notes: First invocation of the weekly improvement routine after the bootstrap seed. Evidence base is a single run log (2026-06-12, the first real run day), so yield, zero-yield queries, and the one watchlist_gap miss (HN 48489917) each rest on one day, not repeated misses or zero yield across clean days. make yield reports over 1 run log; its 8 zero-yield queries (Apple Silicon, Azure, Grafana, Homebrew, Kafka, Kotlin, Neovim, OpenTelemetry) are a single-day artifact, not durable signal. backtest for 2026-06-11 could not run (snapshot and run log absent from the checkout). One feedback issue, #10 by xkef, marks the Cisco SD-WAN CVE-2026-20245 story 'not interesting' with no details; a lone not-interesting on an actively-exploited CVE is not enough to propose interest drift. Persistent source 403 blocks (all six HN backends, cloudflarestatus, status.cloud.google.com, msrc, cisco, chrome, nvidia forum) are datacenter-IP specific, already handled by the Actions snapshot fallback, and already tracked by issues #8 and #9, so no new blocked-source issue is warranted on one day. Per proposal discipline, opened nothing. Next real weekly review should run once seven days of clean run logs have accumulated.
